attacking_style: Attacks decisively from breakaways on final Cat-1 climbs, demonstrating exceptional sustained climbing power to bridge gaps then immediately counter-attack. Operates as stage hunter rather than GC contender.
team_tactics: Primarily operates independently in breakaways for UAE, focused on stage wins and KOM jersey accumulation. Team does not appear to set specific tempo or provide dedicated positioning support for his efforts.
terrain_preference: Excels on sustained Cat-1 climbs with solo time-trial efforts; vulnerable on transitional/non-mountain stages and technical descents where positioning and bike handling become critical. Strong TT capabilities complement climbing.
vulnerability: Crash-prone in positioning battles and on descents (4 separate crash incidents documented). Fragile on non-mountain terrain, losing significant time on transitional stages. Multi-day recovery toll after breakaway victories compromises subsequent performance.
key_patterns: Crashes frequently in positioning battles and on descents, compromising GC ambitions (4 incidents)
Dominates KOM competitions early through breakaway accumulation before decisive final attacks (2022 Vuelta)
Bridges large gaps then immediately counter-attacks, exceptional sustained climbing power (42-second bridge documented)
Stage wins extract multi-day recovery toll, fades on subsequent climbing stages
Loses significant time on transitional/non-mountain stages when GC positioning required
Strong time-trial ability complements climbing, second-fastest while recovering from injury
form_trajectory: negative: 2023 saw fragility on transitional terrain, descent mistakes, crash vulnerability, and illness compromising bike handling—downward trend from 2022 stage-winning form
